Let me reconsider the puzzle. All green blocks are converted. The sky blue region is now connected. The player is in a corridor. The level is not complete yet.

Or maybe the level completes when the player reaches a specific color or position. Let me think about what I haven't tried:

Let me try moving RIGHT to the far right to see if that triggers something. Or maybe I should click on the player or some other area.
Actually, let me reconsider the whole puzzle. The green blocks were at specific positions. When I converted them, they became sky blue, connecting the sky blue regions. Maybe the goal was just to connect all the sky blue regions, and the level should have completed. But it didn't.
Let me check if maybe I need to navigate the player to a specific location. The player is currently at cols 15-16. Let me move them to the rightmost position (cols 51-52) and see if that triggers completion.
Actually, wait. Let me re-read the valid actions. It says ACTION7 is valid but when I tried it, it gave an error. Let me check if maybe the action name is different or if there's a specific way to invoke it.
Actually, looking at the error message again: "Unknown action at index 1: 'ACTION7'" - this is weird because ACTION7 is listed in valid_actions. Maybe there's a different naming convention.
Let me try a different approach. Let me move the player to the far right and see what happens.
